name: Safe synthetic playbook: MFA fatigue pattern (numerous prompts)
description: Lab enumeration of repeated push-challenge telemetry for a test account. Describes volume and pacing only—no payloads, no OTP capture, no instruction to harass users.

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: IdP emits first synthetic push MFA challenge for lab principal.
Fixture counter records N synthetic denials/timeouts exceeding lab threshold.
Rule labels pattern as MFA fatigue risk and opens review queue (stub).

events_emitted.headline: Volume-based MFA alert
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Counters-only fixture; does not imply successful authentication.

events_emitted.headline: Finding tied to suspected fatigue campaign
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Policy engine scores pattern for possible coordinated prompting (simulation).

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: Alert volume crosses fatigue heuristic in lab profile.
User education on approving only expected prompts may be queued.

expected_remediation.summary: Simulator expects rate-limit tuning plan, phishing-resistant MFA roadmap note, and user comms stub—no coercion of approvals.

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Temporarily widen cooling period between challenges in lab IdP sandbox (fixture flag).

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: Changing MFA vendor settings or phishing-resistant methods requires change control.

expected_final_report.title: MFA fatigue signal — synthetic playbook outcome
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: Repeated synthetic challenges flagged a fatigue pattern; playbook documents containment and MFA hardening without assuming compromise.
